articles.title: Moni, Sharmin help Bangladesh register maiden ODI win against Sri Lanka
articles.description: Bangladesh lost four wickets for one run when they were close to the finish line, but averted disaster in the end

articles.title: SL allrounder Shanaka banned from PSL for one year
articles.description: Shanaka opted out of a contract with Lahore Qalandars and later joined IPL team Rajasthan Royals

articles.title: Former Afghanistan quick Shapoor Zadran battles for his life in Delhi hospital
articles.description: Shapoor Zadran is suffering from Hemophagocytic Lymphohistiocytosis (HLH), a rare, life-threatening disease, in which the immune system starts failing

articles.title: Sarfaraz appointed head coach as Pakistan name four newbies for Bangladesh Tests
articles.description: Abdullah Fazal, Amad Butt, Azan Awais, and Ghazi Ghori are the new faces in Pakistan's Test squad; Asad Shafiq (batting coach) and Umar Gul (bowling coach) join the back room

articles.title: ECB to review injury replacements rule after fresh round of criticism
articles.description: Lancashire baffled after Tom Bailey turned down as like-for-like replacement for Ajeet Singh Dale

articles.title: ECB considering relaxing rules on England eligibility
articles.description: Changes under discussion could bring England qualification more into line with ICC regulations

articles.title: Canada T20 World Cup match under ICC corruption investigation
articles.description: A new documentary aired on Friday makes claims about an over bowled by captain Dilpreet Bajwa against New Zealand

articles.title: Former Afghan cricketer Shapoor Zadran admitted in ICU in Delhi as he battles life-threatening disease
articles.description: The 38-year-old, is reportedly in an advanced stage of HLH and is undergoing treatment in the intensive care unit.

articles.title: ‘You really feel special’ - Sachin Tendulkar reflects on Laureus honour among top athletes
articles.description: Sachin Tendulkar won the Laureus Sporting Moment (2000-2020) award for his iconic 2011 ICC Cricket World Cup triumph.
